steps.expected: classifySymbolWithResolver returns symShared when SID < localStart
steps.observed: PASS: $50 and $999 with localStart=1000 both return symShared. $0 returns symUnknown (special system symbol). c73 returns symShort (falls through to non-resolver path).

steps.expected: Symbols with SID < 1000 classified as shared
steps.observed: All resolver-based shared detection cases pass
PASS: APPROXIMATE_PAGE_LIST, crop_bleed, dictionary_rules, mkfx_id, page_list_entry, srl_created_by_stampler, yj.dictionary.text, note_template_collection all return symCommon

assertions.title: classify_symbol — COMMON prefix and regex matches

steps.expected: Various COMMON prefix/regex patterns return symCommon, negatives return other types
steps.observed: PASS: kfx_cover_image_large, content_42, eidbucket_7, PAGE_LIST_1234567890, UUID, yj.conversion.html_name, yj.authoring.test, yj.print.page, yj.semantics.heading, nmdl.canvas_width all return symCommon. Negative cases (content_, content_abc, PAGE_LIST_123, not-a-uuid, yj.other.thing) return symUnknown as expected.

steps.expected: G42, G42-spm, yj.dictionary.other return symDictionary. G, g42, G42-extra do not return symDictionary.
steps.observed: PASS: G42 → symDictionary, G42-spm → symDictionary, G0 → symDictionary, yj.dictionary.text → symCommon (COMMON priority), yj.dictionary.other → symDictionary. G → symUnknown, g42 → symShort, G42-extra → symUnknown.

steps.expected: All ORIGINAL regex patterns match symOriginal. Non-matching variants return lower-priority type.
steps.observed: PASS: 30 test cases covering V_ prefix, resource/anchor/section/story/style/nav prefixes, LANDMARKS_/TOC_, LazyLoad/Target, slice pdf, Target_pg, KFXConditionalNavGroupUnit, exact strings (order-1, TargetReadingOrder, PageLabels, toc_entry). Non-matching V_0 returns symUnknown.

steps.expected: 22+ char alphanumeric strings return symBase64. Short strings do not.
steps.observed: PASS: 22-char minimum validated, resource/ prefix validated, [ctliz] prefix validated, suffixes (-hd, .jpg, .ttf, .otf, .woff, -ad, -spm, _thumbnail) all work. 21-char string returns symUnknown. 'short' and 'cShortID' return symUnknown.

steps.expected: Short patterns like c73, rsrcAABB, resource/rsrcAABB return symShort. Boundary cases handled correctly.
steps.observed: PASS: c73, rsrcAABB, resource/rsrcAABB, resource/eAABB, eAB12 all return symShort. Suffix variants (-hd, .jpg, .ttf, -ad, -spm, _thumbnail, -resized-100-200) work. 'c' (no uppercase) → symUnknown. 'c1234567' (7 chars exceeds limit) → symUnknown.

steps.expected: Unmatched symbols and empty string return symUnknown
steps.observed: PASS: 'totally-random-identifier' → symUnknown, '' → symUnknown, 'x' → symUnknown, 'not_a_known_pattern_at_all' → symUnknown.

steps.expected: First match wins: SHARED → COMMON → DICTIONARY → ORIGINAL → BASE64 → SHORT → UNKNOWN
steps.observed: PASS: SHARED takes priority over everything ($50 with resolver). COMMON wins over DICTIONARY (yj.dictionary.text → symCommon). content_42 → symCommon (not SHORT or UNKNOWN). kfx_cover_image_large → symCommon.

steps.expected: Each valid char (a,b,c,d,e,f,i,l,n,p,s,t,z) returns true. Invalid chars return false. Multi-char strings validated.
steps.observed: PASS: All 12 valid single chars (abcdefilnpstz) return true. Invalid chars (ghjkmqruvwxy) return false. Multi-char 'ab' and 'cdefilnpstz' return true. 'ax' and 'xa' return false. Empty string returns true.

summary: Tested 14 assertions (VAL-A-011 through VAL-A-024): all 14 passed. 33 individual test functions/subtests executed, 0 failures. All tests use synthetic Go data with no external dependencies. Test file: internal/kfx/symbol_format_test.go.
